fa-xmark-large.appearanceId: a large X shape formed by two thick diagonal strokes crossing at the center; bold cross mark with two intersecting diagonal lines
fa-xmark-large.functionalityId: dismiss or close a dialog, modal, or notification; cancel or remove a selected item
fa-xmark-large.intentId: close or dismiss an interface element; indicate cancellation or deletion in a UI interaction

fa-xmarks-lines.appearanceId: multiple X marks arranged along horizontal lines, each X sitting on a ruled line; a set of X glyphs distributed across parallel horizontal rules
fa-xmarks-lines.functionalityId: mark multiple lines as incorrect, rejected, or crossed out; indicate errors or deletions across a list of entries
fa-xmarks-lines.intentId: review and flag multiple incorrect or invalid list items; indicate bulk rejection or line-level errors in a form or checklist

fa-y.appearanceId: a single uppercase letter Y with two diagonal upper arms meeting at a central junction descending to a vertical stem; capital Y letterform glyph
fa-y.functionalityId: represent the letter Y as a label, abbreviation, or shortcut key; indicate a Y-axis or branching path
fa-y.intentId: label a Y-axis coordinate or branching junction; use as a keyboard shortcut indicator or alphabetic label in a chart or interface

fa-yin-yang.appearanceId: a circle divided into two interlocking teardrop halves of opposite fill, each half containing a small filled circle; classic yin-yang symbol with two contrasting swirling sections
fa-yin-yang.functionalityId: represent balance, duality, or harmony between opposing forces; indicate Eastern philosophy, wellness, or complementary states
fa-yin-yang.intentId: convey balance or duality in a wellness or philosophy context; represent harmony between opposing elements in a spiritual or mindfulness interface

fa-z.appearanceId: a single uppercase letter Z with a top horizontal bar, diagonal stroke, and bottom horizontal bar; capital Z letterform glyph
fa-z.functionalityId: represent the letter Z as a label, abbreviation, or shortcut key; indicate the last item in an alphabetic sequence
fa-z.intentId: label the final item in an alphabetic list or axis; use as a keyboard shortcut indicator or Z-axis label in a 3D or chart interface

fa-zap.appearanceId: an angular lightning bolt silhouette with a downward zigzag stroke tapering to a point; electrical zap shape with a sharp angular chevron outline
fa-zap.functionalityId: indicate a quick action, power boost, or electrical charge; trigger an instant or high-energy operation
fa-zap.intentId: execute a fast or powerful action; represent electrical energy or an instant trigger in a power or performance interface

fa-zzz.appearanceId: three Z letters stacked diagonally in descending or ascending size, suggesting snoring or sleep; trio of Z glyphs arranged in a cascading stack
fa-zzz.functionalityId: indicate a sleep, idle, or dormant state; represent snoring, rest, or a paused process
fa-zzz.intentId: show that a user, device, or process is asleep or inactive; convey rest or a sleep timer in a device or wellness interface
